text: Six documents confirm Ghislaine Maxwell detained at MDC Brooklyn receiving witness materials and case discovery

location: Metropolitan Correctional Center, New York, NY
text: MCC records: Epstein returned from court after hours; Chief Psychologist conducted suicide risk assessments on-site
Jane Doe 1000 lawsuit: Epstein recruited her under false modeling pretext, then molested and groomed her at his NYC mansion
PI working for Epstein cloned a Maxwell computer from Palm Beach house in 2005; FBI found copies in NYC townhouse in 2019
